name: J1939TestChkCreate_SignalRangeViolation
title: J1939TestChkCreate_SignalRangeViolation
syntax: long J1939TestChkCreate_SignalRangeViolation( dword sourceAddr, dword destAddr, dbMessage msg, dbSignal signal, float minSignalValue, float maxSignalValue, char callback[] )
description: Checks the value of a signal. The given interval (inclusive the limits) should be never left. An event will be generated, if the physical signal value lies outside the given value interval.
